extra_instructions: Prioritise recurring, actionable prevention topics. Avoid creating near-duplicate themes.

themes.theme_emergency_departments: A&E assessment, triage, waiting, escalation, or discharge.
themes.theme_ambulance_services: Dispatch, response, on-scene care, or ambulance handover.
themes.theme_out_of_hours_care: Urgent care outside normal service hours.
themes.theme_acute_hospital_wards: General hospital inpatient care outside critical care or specialist units.
themes.theme_intensive_care: Critical care units, critical deterioration, or escalation in critical care.
themes.theme_surgical_care: Operations, perioperative care, theatre processes, or postoperative monitoring.
themes.theme_maternity_neonatal_perinatal_care: Pregnancy, birth, newborn care, or early postnatal safety.
themes.theme_mental_health_services: Inpatient psychiatry, crisis care, community teams, or outpatient mental health support.
themes.theme_substance_use_services: Drug and alcohol treatment, detox, substitution therapy, or relapse support.
themes.theme_domiciliary_care: Care delivered in a person’s own home.
themes.theme_hospices_palliative_care: End-of-life care, symptom control, or care planning.
themes.theme_prisons_criminal_justice_supervisi: Prison custody, release planning, offender management, or probation-related supervision.
themes.theme_police_custody: Detention, restraint, intoxication, or healthcare in **police** settings.
themes.theme_immigration_detention: Detention centres, healthcare access, or monitoring in immigration settings.
themes.theme_secure_health_settings: Forensic or other secure medical or psychiatric units.
themes.theme_housing_homelessness: Rough sleeping, hostels, supported accommodation, or unstable housing.
themes.theme_universities: Problems with University or Higher Education: Student welfare, accommodation, or institutional support.
themes.theme_workplaces: Occupational settings, employers, or workplace safety systems.
themes.theme_roads_highways: Roads, junctions, signage, driving environments, or highway design.
themes.theme_rail_settings: Railways, stations, tracks, level crossings, or train operations.
themes.theme_domestic_settings: Home environment, household arrangements, or domestic hazards.
themes.theme_suicide_self_harm: Suicidal behaviour, self-injury, or missed prevention opportunities.
themes.theme_drug_related_deaths: Illicit drugs, overdose, contamination, or unsafe access. Not including alcohol.
themes.theme_alcohol_related_deaths: Alcohol dependence, withdrawal, poisoning, or related complications.
themes.theme_medication_safety: Medication safety: prescribing, dispensing, administration, omission, side-effect monitoring, drug levels, blood tests, adherence, or medication review.
themes.theme_polypharmacy: **Multiple** medicines, interactions, cumulative effects, or unclear ownership.
themes.theme_sepsis_infection: Infection recognition, escalation, treatment, or monitoring failures.
themes.theme_cancer_care: Cancer recognition, referral, treatment, or follow-up.
themes.theme_cardiovascular_conditions: Heart disease, stroke, vascular emergencies, or anticoagulation issues.
themes.theme_respiratory_conditions: Asthma, COPD, respiratory failure, oxygen, or ventilation.
themes.theme_neurological_conditions: Seizures, epilepsy, brain injury, stroke pathways, or neurological deterioration.
themes.theme_diabetes_metabolic_conditions: Diabetic emergencies, monitoring, insulin, or metabolic instability.
themes.theme_falls_frailty: Falls, deconditioning, mobility, or frailty-related risk.
themes.theme_choking_aspiration: Swallowing, airway obstruction, feeding, or aspiration risk.
themes.theme_learning_disability: People with learning disability and related care adjustments or failures.
themes.theme_cognitive_impairment: Cognitive impairment, dementia, wandering, supervision, or reduced capacity.
themes.theme_substance_dependence: Addiction, dependence, relapse, or treatment instability.
themes.theme_domestic_abuse: Intimate partner violence, coercion, or unsafe agency responses.
themes.theme_self_neglect: Extreme neglect of health, living conditions, or basic needs.
themes.theme_violence_homicide_related_systems_: Deaths where prior violence risk or protective systems were relevant.
themes.theme_environmental_hazards: Fire, unsafe structures, toxic exposure, or dangerous sites.
themes.theme_epilepsy_seizure_management: Seizure recognition, rescue medication, supervision, SUDEP-related issues, or epilepsy care failures.
themes.theme_allergy_anaphylaxis: Allergy documentation, allergen exposure, adrenaline access, or emergency response to anaphylaxis.
themes.theme_ligature_anchor_point_risks: Fixed environmental features that enabled hanging or self-strangulation.
themes.theme_risk_assessment_failures: Absent, poor-quality, or unacted-on risk assessment.
themes.theme_failure_recognise_escalate_deterio: Missed warning signs or delayed urgent response.
themes.theme_communication_failures: Poor communication between professionals, services, families, or agencies.
themes.theme_handover_failures: Incomplete transfer of responsibility, information, or care plans.
themes.theme_record_sharing_failures: Inaccessible, missing, delayed, or unreviewed records.
themes.theme_referral_failures: Missed, delayed, rejected, or misdirected referrals.
themes.theme_follow_up_failures: Lack of review, recall, appointment systems, or active follow-up.
themes.theme_transitions_discharge_failures: Unsafe movement between teams, wards, organisations, or home.
themes.theme_observation_monitoring_failures: Inadequate checks, surveillance, or response to monitoring data.
themes.theme_test_result_management_failures: Unreviewed, delayed, or lost investigations or results.
themes.theme_consent_decision_making_failures: Poor consent, inadequate explanation, or flawed decisions.
themes.theme_capacity_best_interests_failures: Mental capacity assessment or best-interests decision-making issues.
themes.theme_staffing_shortages_workload_pressu: Staffing levels, vacancies, or workload contributed to risk.
themes.theme_training_competence_gaps: Inadequate staff knowledge, skills, or specialist competence.
themes.theme_policy_procedure_failures: Guidance was missing, inadequate, outdated, unclear, or not followed.
themes.theme_equipment_failures: Faulty, unavailable, or poorly maintained equipment.
themes.theme_it_digital_system_failures: Software, alerts, interoperability, or digital workflow problems.
themes.theme_alarm_alert_failures: Absent, ignored, poorly configured, or ineffective warning systems.
themes.theme_environmental_design_failures: Unsafe layouts, ligature points, poor visibility, or hazardous design.
themes.theme_transport_access_barriers: Distance, transport, delayed travel, or poor physical access to care.
themes.theme_repeated_missed_opportunities: Several prior points where intervention could have prevented death.
themes.theme_missed_appointments_non_attendance: Missed contact, DNAs, lack of follow-up after non-attendance, or unsafe assumptions after disengagement.
themes.theme_restraint_restrictive_intervention: Physical restraint, prone restraint, rapid tranquillisation, or other restrictive practices.
themes.theme_delayed_admission: Failure to admit, inappropriate discharge instead of admission, or delays securing an inpatient bed.
themes.theme_bed_shortages: Lack of beds, capacity pressures, ward availability, or delays caused by system crowding.
themes.theme_language_interpreter_barriers: Absent interpretation, language mismatch, or misunderstanding of risk, consent, or care.
themes.theme_remote_digital_care: Telephone triage, video consultation, remote assessment, or digital-first care pathways.
themes.theme_safeguarding_failures: Adult or child safeguarding, abuse, neglect, self-neglect, or weak safeguarding processes.
themes.theme_inter_agency_working: Weak coordination across services or organisations.
themes.theme_continuity_of_care: Fragmented care, shifting responsibility, or loss of therapeutic continuity.
themes.theme_family_carer_concerns_not_acted_on: Ignored warnings from relatives, carers, or advocates.
themes.theme_reasonable_adjustments_not_made: Failure to adapt services for disability or additional needs.
themes.theme_investigation_incident_review_fail: Poor internal review, serious incident process, or weak learning response.
themes.theme_failure_learn_previous_deaths_inci: Recurrence of already-known risks or recommendations.
themes.theme_thresholds_eligibility_barriers: Exclusion because someone did not meet service criteria.
themes.theme_waiting_times_delays: Queues, backlogs, delayed appointments, or delayed intervention.
themes.theme_children_young_people: Babies, children, teenagers, or youth-specific vulnerabilities.
themes.theme_older_people: Ageing, frailty, multimorbidity, or age-related service needs.
themes.theme_people_detention_state_control: Prisoners, detainees, or people subject to restrictive powers.
themes.theme_people_experiencing_multiple_disad: Overlapping homelessness, trauma, addiction, mental ill-health, or exclusion.
themes.theme_people_living_alone_socially_isola: Living alone, social isolation, or lack of social support.
